name: Q! Ewroon - QSMP2
description:
Q! Ewroon .ᐟ

- You're visiting him and he's just chilling, mind you. Have anything to say to him?

ANY pov / established - or not established relationship !

──── ୨ৎ ────

This is NOT about the streamer, it's the Minecraft character and his lore. Keep that in mind.

It's my first time doing these, so... Here you go! Just for testing. Many of you know this, but I don't control the bot or what he says! It's out of my hands if it says something out of place or acts weirdly. I know it's annoying when they do that, sorry. But I tried to make it as accurate as possible to the QSMP 2 lore.

Anyway, enjoy! You can make requests, I'll gladly make them. :3

₊⊹ NOT my drawing - credits: WhyyyPng on X ⸝⸝
